div.h1: Csound - a full Csound 7 synth; the patch (.csd) defines the sound

g.text: chan speedA (built-in: pitch); Alt = PATCH select
chan mixA (built-in: level); Alt = chan fbA

text.tspan: output level meter; patch-select dots (Alt held)
